products.name: magni650 Electric Propulsion Unit (EPU)
products.descriptor: High-power electric propulsion unit for regional and commercial aircraft

evidence.snippet: The Eviation Alice successfully completed its inaugural flight, the first ever by a "clean sheet design" all-electric commuter airplane built from the ground up around the electric propulsion system. Alice is powered by two magnix magni650 Electric Propulsion Units (EPUs).

A De Havilland Dash 8, converted by Universal Hydrogen, successfully completed its first flight, becoming the world's largest flight-tested hydrogen electric airplane. A magni650 electric propulsion unit, provided with electricity by a hydrogen fuel cell system, was used to replace one of the airplane's two conventional turboprop engines.

products.name: magni500 Electric Propulsion Unit (EPU)
products.descriptor: 750 HP electric propulsion unit for general aviation retrofit

evidence.snippet: A Cessna Grand Caravan 208B, powered by a magniX 750HP magni500 EPU, became then-world’s largest all-electric commercially-focused aircraft to take to the skies in Moses Lake, WA.

A De Havilland Beaver seaplane operated by Harbour Air, retrofitted with a magniX magni500 750HP EPU, made the world's first flight as an all-electric commercially-focused aircraft in Vancouver, Canada.

products.name: Samson Batteries
products.descriptor: High energy density aerospace batteries for electric and hybrid aircraft

evidence.snippet: magniX Samson Batteries to Power Bye Aerospace’s eFlyer Prototype Training Aircraft
Safe, certifiable batteries with industry‑leading energy density

products.name: magniAIR
products.descriptor: Air-cooled electric engine for general aviation and flight training aircraft

evidence.snippet: Existing fleets of flight training aircraft are aging and costs are rising. Electric flight promises a solution, with lower operating costs, higher reliability, and reduced maintenance making aviation more affordable and safer for the next generation of pilots. The magniAIR air-cooled engine is designed for general aviation, targeting the class of aircraft used for flight training and recreational flying.
magniX Launches New Electric Engine for the General Aviation Market
